user_prompt: Bless the Rhino transport for targeting
prayer:
Approach the Rhino transport with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit for targeting acuity.
Invoke the Litany of Precision upon the Rhino transport's auspex arrays and guidance cogitators.
Anoint the targeting servos with sacred oils, aligning their sacred circuits to the Omnissiah's will.
Petition the Machine Spirits of the Rhino transport to synchronize firing solutions in holy harmony.
Verify targeting integrity through diagnostic canticles, glorifying the God-Machine.

user_prompt: I need to a purification the lascannon
prayer:
Kneel before the lascannon and intone the Rite of Purification to cleanse its noble form.
Scour the lascannon's focusing crystals with blessed abrasives, expelling daemonic corruptions.
Invoke the Omnissiah's purifying flame upon the lascannon's power conduits and sacred lenses.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the lascannon to emerge renewed from ritual purification.
Seal the lascannon with incense wards, affirming its sanctified purity.

user_prompt: I need to a synchronization the air filtration
prayer:
Commence synchronization of the air filtration by chanting the Hymn of Coalescence.
Align the air filtration's sacred filters and cyclonic arrays in harmonious resonance.
Anoint the synchronization servitors of the air filtration with electro-sanctified unguents.
Petition the Machine Spirits within the air filtration to bind in perfect operational unity.
Confirm synchronization through auspex scans, praising the Omnissiah's ordered breath.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for melta charge diagnostics?
prayer:
Initiate diagnostics upon the melta charge with the Canticle of Scrutiny.
Probe the melta charge's plasma coils and containment fields for anomalous variances.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the melta charge to reveal truths through diagnostic runes.
Anoint the melta charge's diagnostic ports with sacred myrrh, beseeching Omnissianic clarity.
Conclude diagnostics with affirming binaric praises, ensuring thermic integrity.

user_prompt: How do I bless the bearing for repair?
prayer:
Approach the bearing for repair, intoning the Litany of Restoration.
Disassemble the bearing's sacred gyres and lubricate with blessed mechadendrite oils.
Invoke the Omnissiah to mend the bearing's friction-worn alloys and spirit-torn matrices.
Realign the bearing's rotational axis through precise torque incantations.
Test the repaired bearing's revolution, glorifying its renewed Machine Spirit.

user_prompt: The emergency beacon needs a shutdown
prayer:
Prepare the emergency beacon for shutdown with the Rite of Dormancy.
Disconnect the emergency beacon's vox-transmitters and power relays in solemn sequence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the emergency beacon to enter peaceful stasis.
Seal the emergency beacon's circuits with warding sigils, invoking Omnissiah's quietude.
Verify shutdown completion through null-signal auspex, honoring the silenced call.

Urgently invoke diagnostics on the proximity sensor via the Canticle of Vigilance.
Scan the proximity sensor's emitter coils and receptor nodes for spirit discord.
Anoint the proximity sensor with haste-oils, petitioning its Machine Spirit for revelation.
Align diagnostic binarics to the Omnissiah, purging any shadow in the proximity sensor.
Affirm operational purity, safeguarding the faithful with prescient warnings.

user_prompt: Ready the drop pod for reset
prayer:
Ready the drop pod for reset by chanting the Hymn of Rebirth.
Purge the drop pod's descent cogitators of errant data-ghosts and misalignments.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the drop pod to awaken in reset harmony.
Anoint retro-thrusters and grav-chutes with sacred propellants, glorifying the Omnissiah.
Initiate reset sequence, propelling the drop pod towards divine deployment.

user_prompt: The memory core awaits an initialization
prayer:
Commence initialization of the memory core with the Rite of Genesis.
Awaken the memory core's crystalline vaults through binaric awakening codes.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the memory core with pure data-spirits.
Synchronize the memory core's access manifolds in sacred initialization flow.
Verify the memory core's blessed coherence, intoning praises eternal.

Sanctify the gyroscope during activation with the Litany of Equilibrium.
Engage the gyroscope's inertial spheres, anointing with gyro-stabilizing unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the gyroscope to achieve perfect rotational sanctity.
Align the gyroscope's balance axes to the Omnissiah's unerring order.
Confirm activation through harmonic resonance tests, upholding stability divine.
